zh.lifeSummary: 當William Stafford於大約1272年出生在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾布拉姆沙拉爾時，他的父親Sir William Stafford37歲，母親Mrs William Stafford35歲。他和Mrs William Stafford至少有5個兒子和2個女兒。他去世於1307年在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾安布萊可特享年36歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Stafford于大约1272年出生在英国英格兰斯塔福爾布拉姆沙拉爾时，他的父亲Sir William Stafford37岁，母亲Mrs William Stafford35岁。他和Mrs William Stafford至少有5个儿子和2个女儿。他去世于1307年在英国英格兰斯塔福爾安布萊可特享年36岁。

nameMeanings.name: Stafford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name principally from Stafford (Staffordshire), but occasionally from other places with similar names, such as Stafford House in Ifield (Sussex), possibly East and West Stowford in East Down (Devon), and three minor places in Devon called Stafford, in Dolton, Broadhembury, and Colyton parishes. The places are all named with Old English ford ‘ford’ as the final element, but have different initial elements. The Staffordshire placename has Old English stæth ‘river bank, shore’; Stafford in Colyton (Devon) has Old English stān ‘stone, rock’; the Sussex placename has Old English stēor ‘steer, bullock’; East and West Stowford (Devon) have Old English stæf ‘staff, stave, rod’; Stafford in Dolton and Stafford in Broadhembury (Devon) may have Old English stæth, stān, or stæf.

variants.name: Stocker
meanings: German and Swiss German (also Stöcker): topographic name for someone living by a tree stump (see Stock 3) or an occupational name for a tree cutter, from Middle High German stocken ‘to clear land’.
German and Swiss German (also Stöcker); Dutch: occupational name from Middle High German, Middle Dutch stocker ‘jailer’.

English: occupational name from Middle English stokker ‘one who sells stockfish’ (fish dried in the air without salt). This was the usual source of the name in medieval London, where a bylaw of 1419 stated that no stokker should board a ship to buy fish (presumably in order to forestall the market).

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When William Stafford was born about 1272, in Bramshall, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir William Stafford, was 37 and his mother, Mrs William Stafford, was 35. He had at least 5 sons and 2 daughters with Mrs William Stafford. He died in 1307, in Amblecote, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 36.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Stafford est né environ 1272, à Bramshall, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir William Stafford, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Mrs William Stafford, avait 35 ans. Il a eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles avec Mrs William Stafford. Il est décédé en 1307, à Amblecote, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 36 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Stafford um 1272 in Bramshall, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir William Stafford 37 und seine Mutter Mrs William Stafford 35. Er hatte mit Mrs William Stafford mindestens 5 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1307 im Alter von 36 Jahren in Amblecote, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Stafford è nato il circa 1272 nel Bramshall, Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir William Stafford, aveva 37 anni e il suo madre, Mrs William Stafford, aveva 35 anni. Lui avuto almeno 5 figli e 2 figlie con Mrs William Stafford. Morì nel 1307, nel Amblecote, Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 36 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: William Staffordが約1272年にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアブラムシャルで生まれた時，父Sir William Staffordは37歳，母Mrs William Staffordは35歳であった。彼はMrs William Staffordとの間に少なくとも5人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼は1307年にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアアンブレコトで36歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William Stafford(이)가 대략 1272년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 브램샤에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir William Stafford(은)는 37세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs William Stafford(은)는 35세였다. 그는 Mrs William Stafford(와)과 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1307년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 아블렉트에서 36세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Stafford nasceu aproximadamente 1272, em Bramshall, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir William Stafford, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Mrs William Stafford, tinha 35 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 5 filhos e 2 filhas com Mrs William Stafford. Ele faleceu em 1307, em Amblecote, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 36 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Stafford родился около 1272 г. в местности брамшолл, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir William Stafford было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs William Stafford, 35. У него было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери от Mrs William Stafford. Он умер в 1307 г. в местности эмблекот, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 36 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William Stafford nació aproximadamente 1272, en Bramshall, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir William Stafford, tenía 37 años y su mamá, Mrs William Stafford, tenía 35 años. Tuvo por lo menos 5 hijos y 2 hijas con Mrs William Stafford. Murió en 1307, en Amblecote, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 36 años.
